topics.query_en: UML Use Case Diagram include vs extend explained
topics.query_ar: شرح الفرق بين include و extend في use case diagram
topics.reason: Students frequently confuse when a use case is mandatory (include) versus optional or conditional (extend).

topics.query_ar: شرح كتابة use case description بالتفصيل
topics.reason: Capturing all alternative flows and exceptions systematically without missing edge cases requires high analytical precision.

topics.query_en: How to identify actors and system boundaries in UML
topics.query_ar: شرح تحديد الفاعلين actors وحدود النظام system boundary
topics.reason: It is often difficult for beginners to separate external entities (actors) from internal system components.
